html:
Exclusive to:

GenericOffChargingCharged

Handy Remote is a special item that can be crafted and used only by Winona with the "Portability" skill.

Every use of Handy Remote spends 1% of its energy. To charge Handy Remote, drop it near Winona's Generator or Winona's G.E.M.erator. One day near a generator will charge it to 100%. With Quick Charge skill, the Remote charges 100% faster

Handy Remote has 4 skills. Shadow and Enlightened Strikes replace each other (you can also mix these skills and get Planar Strike).

Contents

  • 1 Skills
    • 1.1 Arm Catapult
    • 1.2 Target
    • 1.3 Barrage
    • 1.4 Shadow Strike
    • 1.5 Enlightened Strike
    • 1.6 Planar Strike
  • 2 Gallery

Skills

Arm Catapult

Winona with the "Portability" skill can use the Handy Remote to turn Winona's Catapults on.

Target

Winona with the "Precise Targeting" skill can use the Handy Remote to set a target for all Winona's Catapults within range of the player's Handy Remote. This skill can be used to kill fish in ocean.

Barrage

Winona with the "Barrage" skill can use the Handy Remote to make all Winona's Catapults within range fire 50% faster for 20 seconds.

Shadow Strike

Winona with the "Shadow Strike" skill can use the Handy Remote to make Shadow Strikes with her Winona's Catapult. Shadow Strike will deal 0 physical damage and 30 planar damage. It will spawn a temporary patch of thorny vines that slows and deals 34 damage (14 physical damage and 20 planar damage) to any creatures moving within it. Vines do not deal damage to friendly followers or any creatures that are standing still. Shadow Strike will work only on catapults charged by Pure Horror (using the "Pure Horror Generator skill").

Enlightened Strike

Winona with the "Enlightened Strike" skill can use the Handy Remote to make Enlightened Strikes with her Winona's Catapult. Enlightened Strike will deal 0 physical damage and 120 planar damage. It will also destroy some natural objects such as boulders or trees. Enlightened Strike will work only on catapults charged by Pure Brilliance (using the "Brilliance G.E.M.erator skill").

Planar Strike

Winona with the "Enlightened Strike" and "Shadow Strike" skill can use the Handy Remote to make Enlightened Strikes and Shadow Strikes at the same time with her Winona's Catapult. This Strike will deal 0 physical damage and 120 planar damage. It will destroy some natural objects such as boulders or trees and spawn a temporary patch of thorny vines that slows and deals 34 damage (14 physical damage and 20 planar damage) to any creatures moving within it. Vines do not deal damage to friendly followers or any creatures that are standing still. This Strike will work only on catapults charged by Pure Brilliance from Winona's G.E.M.erator and Pure Horror from Winona's Generator at the same time (using the "Brilliance G.E.M.erator skill").

Gallery

  • Handy Remote UI concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Handy Remote UI animation from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Điều khiển từ xa tiện dụng là một vật phẩm đặc biệt chỉ có thể chế tạo và sử dụng bởi Winona với kỹ năng "Portability".

'''Handy Remote''' is a special item that can be crafted and used only by [[Winona]] with the "[[Portability]]" skill.

Every use of Handy Remote spends 1% of its energy. To charge Handy Remote, drop it near [[Winona's Generator]] or [[Winona's G.E.M.erator]]. One day near a generator will charge it to 100%. With [[Quick Charge]] skill, the Remote charges 100% faster

Handy Remote has 4 skills. Shadow and Enlightened Strikes replace each other (you can also mix these skills and get Planar Strike).

== Skills ==
===[[File:Arm Catapult Icon.png|32px]] Arm Catapult===
Winona with the "[[Portability]]" skill can use the [[Handy Remote]] to turn Winona's Catapults on.

===[[File:Target Icon.png|32px]] Target===
Winona with the "[[Precise Targeting]]" skill can use the Handy Remote to set a target for all [[Winona's Catapult]]<nowiki/>s within range of the player's [[Handy Remote]]. This skill can be used to kill fish in ocean.

===[[File:Barrage Icon.png|32px]] Barrage===
Winona with the "[[Barrage]]" skill can use the Handy Remote to make all [[Winona's Catapult|Winona's Catapults]] within range fire 50% faster for 20 seconds.

===[[File:Shadow Strike Icon.png|32px]] Shadow Strike===
Winona with the "[[Shadow Strike]]" skill can use the Handy Remote to make Shadow Strikes with her [[Winona's Catapult]]. Shadow Strike will deal 0 physical damage and 30 planar damage. It will spawn a temporary patch of thorny vines that slows and deals 34 damage (14 physical damage and 20 planar damage) to any creatures moving within it. Vines do not deal damage to friendly followers or any creatures that are standing still. Shadow Strike will work only on catapults charged by [[Pure Horror]] (using the "[[Pure Horror Generator]] skill").

===[[File:Enlightened Strike Icon.png|32px]] Enlightened Strike===
Winona with the "[[Enlightened Strike]]" skill can use the Handy Remote to make Enlightened Strikes with her [[Winona's Catapult]]. Enlightened Strike will deal 0 physical damage and 120 planar damage. It will also destroy some natural objects such as boulders or trees. Enlightened Strike will work only on catapults charged by [[Pure Brilliance]] (using the "[[Brilliance G.E.M.erator]] skill").

===[[File:Planar Strike Icon.png|32px]] Planar Strike===
Winona with the "[[Enlightened Strike]]" and "[[Shadow Strike]]" skill can use the Handy Remote to make Enlightened Strikes and Shadow Strikes at the same time with her [[Winona's Catapult]]. This Strike will deal 0 physical damage and 120 planar damage. It will destroy some natural objects such as boulders or trees and spawn a temporary patch of thorny vines that slows and deals 34 damage (14 physical damage and 20 planar damage) to any creatures moving within it. Vines do not deal damage to friendly followers or any creatures that are standing still. This Strike will work only on catapults charged by [[Pure Brilliance]] from [[Winona's G.E.M.erator]] and [[Pure Horror]] from [[Winona's Generator]] at the same time (using the "[[Brilliance G.E.M.erator]] skill").
